name: Card Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar.
2. Mix in egg; stir in molasses.
3. Sift flour with dry ingredients and add to butter.
4. Turn dough onto a floured board and roll 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut into oblongs measuring 3" x 4".
6. Score cards with knife in half-inch parallel lines.
7. Place on greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 325°F oven for 10 minutes.
Yield: 2 dozen cards
